content:
With the introduction of ethereal cores this half anniversary, these pulls will expire in 78 days as of writing this post. 

This suggestion aims to speed up the re-run banners so that players can pull for their desired units with ethereal cores before they expire. 

There are currently 29 limited units 

Aqeuor: Tulu/Murphy/Miryam/Corpo/Vortice/Gmurphy

Chaos: Lily/24/Kath/Ryker/Tawil/Mouchette/Ham/Gdoll

Caro: Thais/Sorel/Salvador/Gelot/Doresain/Pickman/Xu/Saya

Ultra: Daff/Wanda/Horla/Clem/Castor/Pollux/Arachne


Can the devs please consider

- Having 4 rerun banners; chaos/aqueor/caro/ultra, with 3 units rerunning in each of these realms

- This way 12 units can rerun simultaneously at one time, for 1 month. 

With this system, it’s relatively easy to rerun all 29 limited units before the next patch within 78 days.

Im also open to any suggestions / methods as long as it speeds up the reruns<:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
thread_title: Speed up  rerun banners

content:
"No Aequor or Ultra unit was hindered by the new realm variation" is false though
You are trying to paint Caro as the only realm getting harmed in its playstyle but its new divine variation
No Caro character so far needed their devour bonus or crimson furnace as basic part of their kit 
Unlike White Stance for Aequor or Insights for Ultra 
In fact it can even be argued that Caro is the realm least harmed by its divine variant using those examples
thread_title: Please rework how Propagation Caro works for the future units

content: Actually some of them have it as part of their kit
thread_title: Please rework how Propagation Caro works for the future units

content:
For aequor the examples are : 
-Tulu needing white stance for STR down on 3 cost, and -2 arith on 4 cost at E1
-Miryam needing white stance access to act as an aliemus battery
-Festival of Tides, the posse alos wants access to white stance for its poison effect
None of those effects are consistent under Divine Aequor and all those options are harmed by it
